name: Saudi Laws Sync - سحب وتحديث القوانين السعودية

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ids: [$json.chunk_id], embeddings: [$json.embedding], documents: [$json.chunk_text], metadatas: [{ law_name: $json.law_name, source: $json.source, law_id: $json.law_id, chunk_index: $json.chunk_index }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('فشل الـ embedding للـ chunk:', $input.item.json.chunk_id);
